books.title: The Remnant Protocol
books.comp_authors: Kazuo Ishiguro, Cormac McCarthy, Walter M. Miller Jr., George Orwell
books.premise: In the near-future city of Vael, Caleb — a meticulous AI systems architect — discovers a null reference buried in the city's compliance infrastructure that should not exist. Following it means risking everything: his clearance, his career, his daughter's safety. Not following it means being complici...
